subject: feat(projects): add deployed project cards from GitHub repos
body:
Queried all devmade-ai and illuminAI-select GitHub repos via the API,
identified those deployed to GitHub Pages or Vercel, read each repo's
README and package.json to extract purpose and tech stack, and added
project cards for the 7 deployed projects not yet listed.

New projects: Sancio (module-based agreements), Four Ems (form builder),
Budgy Ting (personal budgeting), FuelHunt (fuel station finder),
repo-tor (git analytics), Chatty Chart (sales data visualisation).

Excluded per request: glow-props, canva-grid-assets, plant-fur,
coin-zapp, tool-till-tees. Also excluded see-veo (this repo).

Tags: projects, cv-data, content, github-api
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: deployed-projects
Semver: minor
